rule_name: US 401(k) and Retirement Plan Contribution Limits 2026
scope: Participants in 401(k), 403(b), governmental 457 plans, Thrift Savings Plan (TSP), traditional IRA, Roth IRA, SIMPLE IRA.
source_name: Internal Revenue Service (IRS), US Department of the Treasury
notes: Per IRS IR-2025-111. 401k employee limit increased from $23,500 to $24,500. IRA limit increased from $7,000 to $7,500. SECURE 2.0 Act enhanced catch-up for age 60-63. Review in November 2026 when IRS publishes 2027 amounts.

four01k_403b_457_tsp.notes: Employee + employer combined limit (415c) not specified in source — approximately $70,000; verify from IRS Notice 2025-82.

simple_ira.notes: SIMPLE IRA limit increased from $16,500 to $17,000. SECURE 2.0 enhanced limit for qualifying employers.

sep_ira.notes: SEP-IRA limit is 25% of compensation or $70,000 (2025 figure) — verify 2026 amount from IRS.
